heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Federico Fellini. Written by Ennio Flaiano, Tullio Pinelli, Federico Fellini, and Brunello Rondi.
clean: Directed by Federico Fellini. Written by Ennio Flaiano, Tullio Pinelli, Federico Fellini, and Brunello Rondi.

heading: Guido Anselmi
raw: Accept me as I am. Only then can we discover each other.
clean: Accept me as I am. Only then can we discover each other.

heading: Guido Anselmi
raw: Enough of symbolism and these escapist themes of purity and innocence.
clean: Enough of symbolism and these escapist themes of purity and innocence.

heading: Guido Anselmi
raw: My Dears... Happiness consists of being able to tell the truth without hurting anyone.
clean: My Dears... Happiness consists of being able to tell the truth without hurting anyone.

heading: Guido Anselmi
raw: All the confusion of my life... has been a reflection of myself! Myself as I am, not as I'd like to be.
clean: All the confusion of my life... has been a reflection of myself! Myself as I am, not as I'd like to be.

heading: Guido Anselmi
raw: The truth is: I do not know... I seek... I have not yet found. Only with this in mind can I feel alive and look at you without shame.
clean: I do not know... I seek... I have not yet found. Only with this in mind can I feel alive and look at you without shame.

heading: Writer
raw: It's better to destroy than create what's unnecessary.
clean: It's better to destroy than create what's unnecessary.

heading: Writer
raw: Destroying is better than creating, when we're not creating those few truly necessary things.
clean: Destroying is better than creating, when we're not creating those few truly necessary things.

heading: Writer
raw: Life is so full of confusion already, there's no need to add chaos to the chaos.
clean: Life is so full of confusion already, there's no need to add chaos to the chaos.

heading: Other
raw: Pace, il produttore: Why piece together the tatters of your life - the vague memories, the faces... the people you never knew how to love?
clean: Pace, il produttore: Why piece together the tatters of your life - the vague memories, the faces... the people you never knew how to love?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Claudia: I don't understand. He meets a girl that can give him a new life and he pushes her away?
clean: I don't understand. He meets a girl that can give him a new life and he pushes her away?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Guido: Because he no longer believes in it.
clean: Because he no longer believes in it.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Claudia: Because he doesn't know how to love.
clean: Because he doesn't know how to love.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Guido: Because it isn't true that a woman can change a man.
clean: Because it isn't true that a woman can change a man.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Claudia: Because he doesn't know how to love.
clean: Because he doesn't know how to love.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Guido: And above all because I don't feel like telling another pile of lies.
clean: And above all because I don't feel like telling another pile of lies.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Claudia: Because he doesn't know how to love.
clean: Because he doesn't know how to love.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Guido: Could you walk out on everything and start all over again? Could you choose one single thing, and be faithful to it? Could you make it the one thing that gives your life meaning... just because you believe in it? Could you do that?"
clean: Could you walk out on everything and start all over again? Could you choose one single thing, and be faithful to it? Could you make it the one thing that gives your life meaning... just because you believe in it? Could you do that?"

heading: Dialogue
raw: Claudia: I don't know... could you?"
clean: I don't know... could you?"

heading: Dialogue
raw: Guido: No, the character I'm thinking of couldn't. He wants to possess and devour everything. He can't pass anything up. He's afraid he'll miss something. He's drained.
clean: No, the character I'm thinking of couldn't. He wants to possess and devour everything. He can't pass anything up. He's afraid he'll miss something. He's drained.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Claudia: That's how the film ends?
clean: That's how the film ends?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Guido: No, that's how it begins. Then he meets a girl at the springs. She gives him water to heal him. She's beautiful... young, yet ancient... child, yet already a woman... authentic, complete. It's obvious that she could be his salvation.
clean: No, that's how it begins. Then he meets a girl at the springs. She gives him water to heal him. She's beautiful... young, yet ancient... child, yet already a woman... authentic, complete. It's obvious that she could be his salvation.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Guido: You'll wear white... with long hair, just as you do now.
clean: You'll wear white... with long hair, just as you do now.
